title: Draft generation: request form + generation API + persist history

task.description: Create /generate page with topic + prompt form gated by tone training. Add /api/drafts/generate to use user tone_profile, generate stubbed draft text, persist draft record, and route to editor on success only.
acceptance_criteria: Untrained users visiting /generate are redirected to /train (or see blocking UI + CTA).
Submitting with missing topic or prompt shows inline validation and no API call is made.
POST generate success creates a drafts row with request inputs, generatedText, timestamps, userId, and returns draftId.
If generation API returns 500, UI shows error and no drafts record is created (verify DB unchanged).
Submitting same request twice creates two distinct draft IDs with different createdAt timestamps.

definition_of_done: API returns correct status codes and never leaks cross-user data
ui_requirements: Generate page uses Card with FormField(Input for topic, Textarea for prompt). Submit Button default; show LoadingState while generating. Error banner on failure with retry. If blocked, EmptyState with CTA Button to /train.
